Missing or unclear details\n- User story format does not follow 'As a ... I want ...' structure.\n- Specific data fields required for each audit type (e.g., SHOP_AUDIT, LANE_AUDIT) are unclear.\n- Error handling during API calls or data publishing is not specified.\n- Performance metrics for measuring API success are undefined.\n\n### Warehouse-specific edge cases\n- Handling of partial inventory availability during picks.\n- Backorder tracking and communication processes with the QIS system.\n- API response for specific lot or serial numbers and handling of expired lots.\n- Behavior in multi-warehouse setups and inventory spread across locations.\n- Exception handling during picking, packing, or shipping processes.\n\n### Integration or dependency risks\n- Success depends on the QIS team creating necessary subscriptions, which may delay timelines.\n- Azure Service Bus must handle expected load without limitations.\n- Existing systems must transition to the new API without disruption.\n\n### QA considerations\n- Validate JSON response structure and accuracy of data retrieval.\n- Test error handling for API failures and invalid unique IDs.\n- Ensure that existing data retrieval processes are not negatively impacted.\n- Monitor performance metrics to confirm improvements over previous methods.\n\n### Questions for grooming discussion\n1. What specific fields are required in the JSON response for each audit type?\n2. How will the system manage failures in message delivery to Azure Service Bus?\n3. What rollback procedures exist if the new API fails?\n4. Are there specific security or authentication requirements for the API?\n5. How will the QIS team confirm successful consumption of messages?\n\n### Verdict\nNeeds Clarification (moderate) - The story requires additional details on functional aspects and edge cases before it can be considered ready for sprint planning."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Co-authored by "},{"type":"text","text":"Augment Code","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://www.augmentcode.com/?utm_source=atlassian&utm_medium=jira_comment&utm_campaign=jira"}}]}]}]},"updateAuthor":{"self":"https://ashley-furniture-team.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=712020%3Af476ccc6-1f45-4505-8cf7-20b3f1948c10","accountId":"712020:f476ccc6-1f45-4505-8cf7-20b3f1948c10","emailAddress":"pamith@ashleyfurnitureindia.com","avatarUrls":{"48x48":"https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/73c0d86075542f588c228348838f02cf?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FPA-6.png","24x24":"https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/73c0d86075542f588c228348838f02cf?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FPA-6.png","16x16":"https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/73c0d86075542f588c228348838f02cf?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FPA-6.png","32x32":"https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/73c0d86075542f588c228348838f02cf?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FPA-6.png"},"displayName":"Perisetla Amith","active":true,"timeZone":"America/New_York","accountType":"atlassian"},"created":"2026-04-17T10:21:46.757-0400","updated":"2026-04-17T10:21:46.757-0400","jsdPublic":true}],"self":"https://ashley-furniture-team.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/122874/comment","maxResults":2,"total":2,"startAt":0}}}

Missing or unclear details\n- **Carton Quantity Definition**: Clarification needed on how carton quantity is defined and sourced.\n- **BOM Structure**: Expected structure of the BOM master and detail records needs specification.\n- **Parent/Child Relationship**: Criteria for establishing parent/child relationships based on carton quantity should be defined.\n- **Receipt Process**: Details on how the receipt process triggers updates from parent to child items are required.\n\n### Warehouse-specific edge cases\n- **Carton Quantity Variability**: Need to address scenarios where carton quantity is zero or negative.\n- **Data Inconsistency**: Handling of discrepancies between AS400 data and WMS data must be defined.\n- **Multiple Carton Quantities**: Clarification on how to manage multiple carton quantities for a single item is necessary.\n- **Error Handling**: Define the approach for managing errors in AS400 integration, including retries and alerts.\n\n### Integration or dependency risks\n- **AS400 Endpoint Availability**: Stability and accessibility of the AS400 endpoint during peak operations need assessment.\n- **Data Synchronization**: Timing of data synchronization between AS400 and WMS should be evaluated to prevent stale data.\n- **Impact on Other Integrations**: Consideration of how changes may affect integrations with ERP, TMS, or OMS.\n\n### QA considerations\n- **Validation Tests**: Confirm that carton quantities translate correctly to parent/child relationships in the BOM.\n- **Fallback Scenarios**: Test system behavior when AS400 is down, using mock data
